validators.title: Acceptance Reconciliation Validator
validators.description: Validates alignment across initiative acceptance IDs, acceptance contracts, validation evidence, validator references, and traceability for one traced initiative.
validators.notes: Used by the watchtower-core validate acceptance command.

validators.title: Command Document Semantics Validator
validators.description: Validates repository-native command-document structure, section order, and source-surface alignment.
validators.notes: Used by watchtower-core validate document-semantics and validate all.

validators.title: Reference Document Semantics Validator
validators.description: Validates governed reference-document structure, section order, and local reference rules.
validators.notes: Used by watchtower-core validate document-semantics and validate all.

validators.title: Foundation Document Semantics Validator
validators.description: Validates governed foundation-document structure and timestamp alignment.
validators.notes: Used by watchtower-core validate document-semantics and validate all.

validators.title: Standard Document Semantics Validator
validators.description: Validates governed standard-document structure, explained applied-reference sections, and local-reference usage.
validators.notes: Used by watchtower-core validate document-semantics and validate all.

validators.title: Workflow Semantics Validator
validators.description: Validates workflow-module structure, section order, and explained governing-source bullets.
validators.notes: Used by watchtower-core validate document-semantics and validate all.

validators.title: Reference Front Matter Validator
validators.description: Validates parsed front matter metadata for governed reference documents.
validators.notes: Validate the parsed front matter object rather than the raw Markdown file.

validators.title: Foundation Front Matter Validator
validators.description: Validates parsed front matter metadata for governed foundation documents.

validators.title: Standard Front Matter Validator
validators.description: Validates parsed front matter metadata for standards that adopt governed front matter.

validators.title: Workflow Front Matter Validator
validators.description: Validates parsed front matter metadata for workflow documents that adopt governed front matter.

validators.title: Pack Work Item Note Validator
validators.description: Validates generic pack-facing work-item note artifacts.
validators.notes: Supports explicit validation or repo-local auto-selection for pack-owned work-item note artifacts without requiring repo-local example fixtures.

validators.title: Benchmark Report Validator
validators.description: Validates generic pack-facing benchmark report artifacts.
validators.notes: Supports explicit validation or repo-local auto-selection for initiative-local and pack-owned benchmark evidence without requiring pack-specific validator duplication.

validators.title: Extraction Output Envelope Validator
validators.description: Validates generic structured extraction workflow output envelopes.
validators.notes: Supports explicit validation or repo-local auto-selection for pack-owned extraction envelopes without requiring repo-local example fixtures.
